title: time shift
description: sometimes the server will randomly change the day to night. good night, and good luck.
body:
I made this datapack in less than an hour. It's not polished, it;s not clean, it's not even all the fun honestly, but I made it and I had fun making it so. yeah.

It lurches time forward by a not insignificant margin at random intervals, so it's kind of a challenge but it depends on how you play. Mole people that live in the ground should (probably) remain unaffected.
